text:
generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
}

datasource db {
  provider = "postgresql"
  url      = env("DATABASE_URL")
}

enum ScanStatus {
  COMPLETED
  NEEDS_REFRESH
}

enum Prayer {
  FAJR
  DHUHR
  ASR
  MAGHRIB
  ISHA
  JUMMAH
}

enum AuthProvider {
  GOOGLE
  APPLE
  MICROSOFT
  EMAIL
}

enum UserRole {
  USER
  MOSQUE_ADMIN
  ADMIN
}

enum NotificationType {
  AZAN
  SILENT_ALERT
  DEPARTURE_REMINDER
}

enum RequestStatus {
  PENDING
  IN_PROGRESS
  COMPLETED
  REJECTED
}

model RegionScan {
  id            String     @id @default(uuid())
  geohash       String     @unique
  centerLat     Float
  centerLon     Float
  radiusKm      Float      @default(300)
  scanStatus    ScanStatus @default(COMPLETED)
  mosquesFound  Int        @default(0)
  lastScannedAt DateTime?
  nextScanDue   DateTime?
  seedFile      String?
  createdAt     DateTime   @default(now())
  updatedAt     DateTime   @updatedAt

  @@index([geohash])
  @@index([nextScanDue])
}

enum PlaceType {
  MOSQUE
  MUSALLA
}

enum SubmissionStatus {
  PENDING
  APPROVED
  REJECTED
}

model Mosque {
  id              String    @id @default(uuid())
  name            String
  type            PlaceType @default(MOSQUE)
  address         String
  city            String
  province        String
  country         String    @default("Canada")
  latitude        Float
  longitude       Float
  phone           String?
  website         String?
  googleRating    Float?
  googleReviewCount Int?
  hasLiveStream    Boolean   @default(false)
  streamUrl        String?
  adminEmail       String?
  verified         Boolean   @default(false)
  notes            String?
  // Automated iqama discovery
  mawaqitId        String?   // MAWAQIT UUID if this mosque is listed there
  iqamaSource      String?   // "mawaqit" | "website" | "manual"
  iqamaLastFetched DateTime? // when iqama was last auto-fetched
  createdAt        DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt        DateTime  @updatedAt

  iqamaSchedules IqamaSchedule[]
  followers      UserMosque[]
}

model MosqueSubmission {
  id              String           @id @default(uuid())
  submittedBy     String?
  user            User?            @relation(fields: [submittedBy], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  name            String
  type            PlaceType        @default(MOSQUE)
  address         String
  city            String
  province        String
  country         String           @default("Canada")
  latitude        Float
  longitude       Float
  phone           String?
  website         String?
  googleRating    Float?
  googleReviewCount Int?
  notes           String?
  photoUrl        String?          // Photo of the mosque/iqama board
  status          SubmissionStatus @default(PENDING)
  adminNotes      String?
  reviewedBy      String?
  createdAt       DateTime         @default(now())
  reviewedAt      DateTime?

  @@index([status])
  @@index([city, province])
}

model IqamaSchedule {
  id            String    @id @default(uuid())
  mosqueId      String
  mosque        Mosque    @relation(fields: [mosqueId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  prayer        Prayer
  iqamaTime     String    // "HH:mm" format
  effectiveFrom DateTime
  effectiveTo   DateTime?
  createdAt     DateTime  @default(now())

  @@index([mosqueId, prayer, effectiveFrom])
}

model User {
  id                 String       @id @default(uuid())
  email              String       @unique
  displayName        String?
  avatarUrl          String?
  authProvider       AuthProvider
  authProviderId     String?
  passwordHash       String?
  emailVerified      Boolean      @default(false)
  defaultLeadMinutes Int          @default(15)
  calcMethod         Int          @default(2)
  azanSound          String       @default("default")
  role               UserRole     @default(USER)
  createdAt          DateTime     @default(now())

  mosques             UserMosque[]
  prayerPrefs         UserPrayerPreference[]
  coverageRequests    CoverageRequest[]
  mosqueSubmissions   MosqueSubmission[]

  @@index([authProvider, authProviderId])
}

model UserPrayerPreference {
  id               String           @id @default(uuid())
  userId           String
  user             User             @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  prayer           Prayer
  leadMinutes      Int
  notificationType NotificationType @default(AZAN)
  enabled          Boolean          @default(true)

  @@unique([userId, prayer])
}

model UserMosque {
  userId    String
  mosqueId  String
  user      User   @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  mosque    Mosque @relation(fields: [mosqueId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  isPrimary Boolean @default(false)

  @@id([userId, mosqueId])
}

model CoverageRequest {
  id         String        @id @default(uuid())
  userId     String
  user       User          @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  latitude   Float
  longitude  Float
  cityName   String?
  province   String?
  country    String?
  status     RequestStatus @default(PENDING)
  adminNotes String?
  createdAt  DateTime      @default(now())
  resolvedAt DateTime?
}

model IqamaRefreshLog {
  id                  String   @id @default(uuid())
  runAt               DateTime @default(now())
  citiesProcessed     Int
  mosquesRefreshed    Int
  mosquesStillMissing Int
  durationMs          Int
  triggeredBy         String   @default("cron") // "cron" | "admin" | "manual"

  @@index([runAt])
}
